rationale: In the citing paper, Griskevicius et al. (2009) is used as one item in a broad descriptive-norms literature review, including a single summary row in Table 2. The paper does not give this citation a distinct theoretical role in its hypotheses about tie strength and consensus language, nor does it reuse its mechanisms, measures, or design. Because the citation functions as general background rather than a specific building block, the relation is best classified as mention-only.
